description:
Implement the lattice operations on Descr. Union and intersection on bitmaps are bitwise; on structurals work componentwise on the DNF representation.

Negation flips bitmap and complements structurals. Difference is intersection-with-negation.

Deliverable: union/intersect/diff/neg fns + tests showing De Morgan and absorption laws hold.
title: Type operations: union, intersection, difference, negation
